title: Appendicula striata
taxonomy: Appendicula striata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Appendicula, which contains over 300 species of orchids. The genus is part of the subfamily Aeridinae and the tribe Gastrodieae. This classification suggests that Appendicula striata is a type of terrestrial orchid with unique characteristics. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification within the orchid family.
